code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{FaSearch}from'react-icons/fa';import{useLanguage}from'../../context/LanguageContext';import'./SearchBar.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const SearchBar=()=>{const{t}=useLanguage();const navigate=useNavigate();const[searchQuery,setSearchQuery]=useState('');const handleSearch=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!searchQuery.trim())return;navigate("/catalog?search=".concat(encodeURIComponent(searchQuery.trim())));setSearchQuery('');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("form",{className:"search-bar",onSubmit:handleSearch,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"search-input-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FaSearch,{className:"search-icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Search manga, manhwa, video...",value:searchQuery,onChange:e=>setSearchQuery(e.target.value),className:"search-input"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"search-btn",children:t('search')})]})});};export default SearchBar;
